title: hieracium norvegicum subsp. hibernicum
intro: Hieracium norvegicum subsp. hibernicum, also known as the Snowy Hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
